suite.elevator: Haven Private Elevators (aft) — directly adjacent to your suite. Your Haven keycard activates them.

haven.description: The Haven Private Elevators — aft position, Haven keycard required
haven.note: Fastest and most exclusive. Your suite is directly adjacent to these on Deck 12. Takes you directly to the Haven complex on Deck 16.

midship.description: Main midship elevator banks — no keycard required, accessible to all guests
midship.note: Good for reaching upper pool decks (Deck 17) and any deck the Haven elevator serves

forward.description: Forward public elevators — no keycard required
forward.note: Useful for theater (Deck 6–8 forward) and forward venues

venues.name: The Haven Restaurant
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 16. The Haven Restaurant is directly ahead, aft. Haven keycard required.
venues.directions_to_suite: Exit The Haven Restaurant and take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard side, short walk from the elevator.

venues.name: The Haven Lounge & Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 16. The Haven Lounge & Bar is in the aft Haven complex, adjacent to the restaurant.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Haven Lounge, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Short walk starboard to suite 12846.

venues.name: The Haven Sundeck & Pool
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator (aft, Deck 12) up to Deck 16. Follow signs aft to the Haven Sundeck — private pool, hot tubs, and bar are all in the aft Haven complex.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Haven Sundeck, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard, a short walk from the elevator.

venues.name: The Bull's Eye Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 16. The Bull's Eye Bar is in the Haven complex, aft — right in the heart of the private Haven area.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Bull's Eye Bar, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Haven Concierge Desk
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 16. The Concierge Desk is in the Haven complex — aft, near the restaurant entrance.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Concierge Desk, take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk starboard.

venues.name: Mandara Spa & Salon
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. Exit and walk forward — the Mandara Spa entrance is at the forward section of Deck 15. Follow spa signs.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Mandara Spa, walk aft on Deck 15 to the Haven elevator and take it down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Thermal Suite (Mandara Spa)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15, then walk forward. The Thermal Suite is inside the Mandara Spa — entrance at the forward end of Deck 15.
venues.directions_to_suite: Exit the Thermal Suite into the spa lobby, walk aft on Deck 15, and take the Haven elevator down to Deck 12.

venues.name: Pulse Fitness Center
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15. Walk forward — the Pulse Fitness Center is at the forward end of Deck 15, near the spa.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Fitness Center, walk aft on Deck 15 to the Haven elevator and take it down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Main Pool & Waves Pool Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15 or 16, then use the midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 17. The main pool area is midship on Deck 17.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the main pool, take the stairs or elevator down to Deck 15 or lower, then take the Haven elevator (aft) down to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Surfside Café
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15 or 16, then use midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 17. Surfside Café is midship on Deck 17, near the main pool.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Surfside Café, head to the elevators or stairs down toward Deck 15, then take the Haven elevator (aft) down to Deck 12.

venues.name: Observation Lounge
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator to Deck 15 or 16, then take midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 17 and walk forward to the Observation Lounge — panoramic views at the bow.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Observation Lounge, walk aft and take the elevators down to Deck 15 or lower, then take the Haven elevator (aft) to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is starboard.

venues.name: Aqua SlideCoaster
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator up toward Deck 15, then use midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 18 for the Aqua SlideCoaster entry point.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the SlideCoaster area, take the stairs or elevator down to Deck 15, then take the Haven elevator (aft) to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Casino
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6. The Casino is in the Penrose Atrium area, midship on Deck 6 — follow signs as you exit the elevator.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Casino, find the Haven elevator aft on Deck 6 and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Starbucks®
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Walk midship toward the Penrose Atrium — Starbucks is in the glass-walled atrium area on Deck 7.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Starbucks in the Penrose Atrium on Deck 7, walk aft to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Cagney's Steakhouse
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Exit and walk forward — Cagney's Steakhouse is in the forward section of Deck 7, near the atrium.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Cagney's, walk aft along Deck 7 to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk starboard.

venues.name: Le Bistro
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Walk forward — Le Bistro is in the forward section of Deck 7, near Cagney's.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Le Bistro, walk aft along Deck 7 to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk.

venues.name: Hasuki (Japanese Teppanyaki)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6. Hasuki is midship on Deck 6, in the Penrose Atrium area — follow signs from the elevator exit.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Hasuki, walk aft to the Haven elevator on Deck 6 and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Nama Sushi Sashimi
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Nama Sushi is midship on Deck 7, in the atrium area.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Nama, walk aft to the Haven elevator on Deck 7 and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Indulge Food Hall
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 8. Exit and walk aft — Indulge Food Hall is on the aft section of Deck 8's Ocean Boulevard, with outdoor hammocks and daybeds.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Indulge, walk forward to the Haven elevator on Deck 8 and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Syd Norman's Pour House
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Syd Norman's is midship on Deck 7 — one of NCL's signature live-music rock venues.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Syd Norman's, walk aft to the Haven elevator on Deck 7 and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Swirl Wine Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6. Swirl Wine Bar is midship on Deck 6, in the atrium complex.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Swirl, take the Haven elevator aft on Deck 6 up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Whiskey Bar
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6. The Whiskey Bar is midship in the Penrose Atrium on Deck 6.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the Whiskey Bar, take the Haven elevator (aft on Deck 6) up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Guest Services / Shore Excursions
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7. Guest Services and Shore Excursions are midship in the Penrose Atrium area on Deck 7.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Guest Services on Deck 7, walk aft to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Shops & Boutiques
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 7 or 8. The main shops are in the Penrose Atrium on Decks 7 and 8.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the shops, take the Haven elevator (aft) back up to Deck 12.

venues.name: Improv at Sea (Comedy Club)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6, then walk forward. Improv at Sea is the comedy club at the forward end of Deck 6 — check the Freestyle Daily for show times.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Improv at Sea, walk aft along Deck 6 to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Luna Theater (Main Stage)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 6, then walk forward. The main theater spans Decks 6–8 at the bow — enter from Deck 6, 7, or 8 forward.
venues.directions_to_suite: From the theater, walk aft along Deck 6, 7, or 8 to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is aft-starboard.

venues.name: Palomar (Mediterranean)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator up to Deck 15 or 16, then use midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 17. Palomar is midship on Deck 17.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Palomar on Deck 17, take the midship elevators down to Deck 15 or lower, then take the Haven elevator (aft) to Deck 12.

venues.name: Sukhothai (Thai Specialty)
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator up toward Deck 15 or 16, then use midship elevators or stairs up to Deck 17. Sukhothai is midship on Deck 17.
venues.directions_to_suite: From Sukhothai on Deck 17, take the midship elevators down toward Deck 15, then take the Haven elevator (aft) to Deck 12.

venues.name: The Local Bar & Grill
venues.directions_from_suite: Take the Haven elevator down to Deck 8. The Local is midship on Deck 8's Ocean Boulevard — 24-hour casual dining with indoor and outdoor seating.
venues.directions_to_suite: From The Local on Deck 8, walk aft to the Haven elevator and take it up to Deck 12.

quick_directions.from_suite_prefix: From Suite 12846: Take the Haven elevator (aft, adjacent to your suite on Deck 12)
quick_directions.to_suite_suffix: Take the Haven elevator back to Deck 12. Suite 12846 is a short walk starboard from the elevator.
quick_directions.note: The Haven elevator uses your Haven keycard. It is faster, private, and the correct elevator for all Haven-complex destinations. The Haven complex (restaurant, lounge, pool, concierge) is on Deck 16 aft. For Deck 17 venues (main pool, Observation Lounge, Surfside Café), take the Haven elevator to 15 or 16, then stairs/midship elevator up to 17.
